items.label: Review submitted partner profile
items.description: Confirm partner type, audience, and compliance risk.

items.label: Send referral partner resource pack
items.description: Include readiness scorecard and referral language.

items.label: Schedule 20-minute fit call
items.description: Clarify referral process and audience fit.

partner_resource_cards.title: Cash-Flow Gap Referral Checklist
partner_resource_cards.description: A short checklist CPAs and bookkeepers can use to identify clients who may need funding-readiness guidance.
partner_resource_cards.usage_notes: Send after initial approval or during referral partner onboarding.
partner_resource_cards.compliance_notes: Use readiness language only. Do not imply approval certainty or guaranteed funding.

partner_resource_cards.title: Referral Partner Language Swipes
partner_resource_cards.description: Safe intro language for CPAs, consultants, and business advisors who want to refer clients without sounding like pushy loan spam.
partner_resource_cards.usage_notes: Use after approval and before first outbound client referral campaign.
partner_resource_cards.compliance_notes: Avoid guaranteed approvals, fixed funding amounts, credit repair claims, or fake urgency.

partner_resource_cards.title: Partner Referral Process Map
partner_resource_cards.description: Simple process map showing what happens after a partner refers a business owner for readiness review.
partner_resource_cards.usage_notes: Use during partner onboarding call or welcome packet delivery.
partner_resource_cards.compliance_notes: Keep the process educational and operational. No lender certainty.

partner_campaign_cards.title: Client Cash-Flow Checkup Intro
partner_campaign_cards.audience: bookkeeping clients with seasonal cash-flow swings
partner_campaign_cards.offer: A funding-readiness review that helps identify documentation gaps and likely next steps.
partner_campaign_cards.tracking_notes: Use partner_id=ptr_harbor_cpa_001 and campaign=client_cash_flow_checkup in UTM fields when tracking links exist.
partner_campaign_cards.copy_angle: Operational readiness, not emergency funding hype.

partner_campaign_cards.title: Quarterly Tax Season Cash-Flow Prep
partner_campaign_cards.audience: CPA clients preparing for quarterly tax deadlines or seasonal revenue swings
partner_campaign_cards.offer: A readiness checklist to help clients organize documents before exploring working-capital options.
partner_campaign_cards.copy_angle: Preparation beats panic. Help clients understand documents, timing, and realistic next steps.

admin_partner_review_card.summary: CPA/bookkeeper with relevant SMB audience, moderate referral potential, and low compliance risk. Best suited for referral-only onboarding before any deeper strategic track.
admin_partner_review_card.reviewer_notes: Send cash-flow gap checklist and schedule quick partner process walkthrough.

dashboard_flags.notes: Internal sample payload. Before partner-facing display, remove admin notes, review metadata, and any private score reasoning.
